NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT HEARING SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAR-15-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 206

CAUSE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/JACQUELINE WOODS AS COUNSEL. DEF. PRESENT & IN PRO PER. SETTLED BY STIP. W/JUDGMENT FOR PL. - RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 217 EDDY ST. #606, S.F, CA. - WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 5PM, 4-8-94 - FORF. OF RENTAL AGREEMENT - RENT & DAMAGES WVD. IN CONSIDERATION FOR DEF. VACATING PREMISES - MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE STIP. & JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AIYA-OBA, ANTHONY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 217 EDDY ST, #606, S.F, CA., STAYED UNTIL APR-08-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, IN CONSIDERATION OF PL. WAIVING ALL RENT & DAMAGES, DEF. WAIVES ANY & ALL CLAIMS AGAINST PL. WRIT TO ISSUE IMMED- IATELY, BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 4-8-94, 5PM.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
